method.A: audio-derived equal sonic, CLAP, and vibe similarity blend
method.formula: G + audio_weight*A + style_weight*S; style_guard_min protects positions 1-3 when enough candidates qualify
method.preview: credential-free Deezer public API availability lookup; names are never replaced
